## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt vet test` passes locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Tested on the platform(s) I touched (macOS / Linux / Windows)
- [ ] No new dependency added (or it's justified in the summary above)
- [ ] Updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
